ORDER ON DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SUTTER WEST BAY HOSPITALS DBA CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE DEMURRER TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED, THE DEMURRER TO SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED, WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND, AND THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE DEMURRER TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS PLED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO ALLEGE A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR MEDICAL MALPRACTICE. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES THAT DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC HOSPITAL CENTER HAD A DUTY TO ENSURE THE COMPETENCE OF ITS MEDICAL STAFF, DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC HOSPITAL CENTER BREACHED THAT DUTY, AND AS A RESULT, PLAINTIFF WAS INJURED. (SAC PARAGRAPHS 8-11.) THE DEMURRER TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED, WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND, IF PLAINTIFF CAN IN GOOD FAITH ALLEGE FACTS THAT DEFENDANT'S CONDUCT WAS EXTREME AND OUTRAGEOUS AND THAT DEFENDANT'S CONDUCT WAS DONE WITH THE INTENTION OF CAUSING, OR WITH THE RECKLESS DISREGARD OF THE POSSIBILITY OF CAUSING PLAINTIFF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. THE DEMURRER TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND, AS PLAINTIFF AGREES TO WITHDRAW THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Sutter West Hospitals Dba California Pacific Medical Center'S Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-08-2017 Text Ruling

Off Calendar Jan-22-2016 Continued To Apr-13-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-31-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT SUTTER WEST BAY HOSPITALS dba CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT - The demurrer to the first cause of action is overruled, the demurrer to second cause of action is sustained, with ten days leave to amend, and the third cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. The demurrer to the first cause of action is overruled because Plaintiff has pled sufficient facts to allege a cause of action for medical malpractice. Plaintiff alleges that Defendant California Pacific Hospital Center had a duty to ensure the competence of its medical staff, Defendant California Pacific Hospital Center breached that duty, and as a result, Plaintiff was injured. (SAC paragraphs 8-11.) The demurrer to the second cause of action is sustained, with ten days leave to amend, if Plaintiff can in good faith allege facts that Defendant's conduct was extreme and outrageous and that Defendant's conduct was done with the intention of causing, or with the reckless disregard of the possibility of causing Plaintiff emotional distress. The demurrer to the third cause of action is sustained without leave to amend, as Plaintiff agrees to withdraw the third cause of action. Order signed. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith ; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/eg
